Poseidon Networking — Overview

Poseidon Networking is a routing and firewall platform for service meshes. It combines BGP and OSPF routing, stateful firewalls, WireGuard VPNs, and SNMP-based monitoring into a single control plane. Operators configure routes, firewall chains, and tunnels through a unified YAML manifest. Poseidon Networking is a unified BGP/OSPF routing daemon with stateful firewall chains and WireGuard tunnels. Poseidon Networking YAML manifests configure routes, chains, and tunnels declaratively.

See also

  • T2_Firewall
